description: Revel in the comfort of pure leather and look stylish in ease in this pair of peep toe sandals from enroute. Pair it with any kind of western and ethnic wear, and look great both ways. This pair comes with a shoe bag to help you carry it around in ease. Heel: 2" Upper Leather upper with perforations for absolute breathable comfort Ergonomically curved leather footbed for enhanced comfort Leather bow on the toes for style Outsole Durable TPU outsole with a grooved forefoot and heel for absolute grip and traction Sandal care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
